Title: MemorySmith.Agent — MemorySmith Wiki Integration (REST Gateway & Local Fallback)
Content:
The agent uses the MemorySmith wiki as its long-term memory through a dual-gateway IMemoryGateway setup. Each gateway (Agent KB and World KB) connects to a separate MemorySmith instance.

## IMemoryGateway Interface (Agent.Core)

- SearchAsync(query, limit=20, ct) → IReadOnlyList<SearchResult>
- GetPageAsync(slug, ct) → Page?
- CreatePageAsync(slug, title, body, minimumRole, ct) → Page
- UpdatePageAsync(slug, title, body, minimumRole, ct) → Page

## RestMemoryGateway (Agent.Memory/RestMemoryGateway.cs)

Implements IMemoryGateway via MemorySmith REST endpoints:
- GET /api/search?query={q}&limit=20 → unified search (pages + memories)
- GET /api/pages/{slug} → page content (body field)
- POST /api/pages → create page {slug, title, body, minimumRole}
- PUT /api/pages/{slug} → update page

SearchResult.Kind field distinguishes 'page' (slug usable in GetPageAsync) from 'memory' (UUID, NOT a valid page slug).

## Dual Gateway Setup (Sprint 22)

| Gateway | Key | Purpose | Default URL |
|---------|-----|---------|-------------|
| Agent KB | (default) | Codebase, guides, architecture | http://localhost:5001 |
| World KB | 'world' | World facts, exploration log | WorldKbUrl (null = disabled) |

Tool routing (Sprint 23):
- SearchMemoryTool, CreatePageTool → World KB (world facts and events)
- GetPageTool → Agent KB (codebase knowledge and guides)

## Configuration (appsettings.json)

Agent:Memory section:
- BaseUrl (string): MemorySmith base URL
- ApiKey (string?): X-Api-Key header if configured
- TimeoutSeconds (int, default 30)
- DefaultPageRole (string, default 'User')
- WorldKbUrl (string?): separate URL for World KB gateway (null = disabled)

## LocalKnowledgeResolver (Agent.Memory/LocalKnowledgeResolver.cs)

Provides local file fallback when MemorySmith instance is unavailable:
- Maps slugs to local files under Data/Pages/ and Data/Memories/
- Used as fallback chain in MemorySmithBlueprintRepository
- Also supports reading item registry pages from Data/Pages/item-registry/

## Known Fixes

- Phase 2: UpdatePageAsync preserves existing title via GET-then-PUT; falls back gracefully if page doesn't exist
- IHttpClientFactory used for connection pooling (not new HttpClient())
- Auth: X-Api-Key header if ApiKey is configured in MemorySmith

## Testing

MockMemoryGateway (in MemorySmith.Agent.Tests) provides in-memory IMemoryGateway implementation. No real MemorySmith instance needed for unit tests. Tests should copy Data/Memories to temp storage before mutation (copilot-instructions.md).
